issues.description: Action type should be 'TrashFromPlay' (trashing this Character from board), not 'TrashFromHand' (trashing from hand)
'excludeSelf:true' is incorrect; the effect explicitly allows trashing 'this Character' as the cost. Should be 'includeSelf:true' or removed to allow self-trashing
Target filter only specifies 'Fish-Man' but card text requires 'Fish-Man' OR 'Merfolk' type. Should use 'subTypes':['Fish-Man','Merfolk'] or equivalent union logic
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn' effect, but verify this matches card's turn context (Main phase activation suggests player's turn)
